title: INSERT INTO a MERGE TABLE crashes mserver5
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE m (id Int32, name String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE t1 (i Int32, j Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY i;
CREATE TABLE t2 (i Int32, k Date) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY i;
key_bug_features: INSERT INTO a MERGE TABLE causes crash
